name: Gluten-Free Kuttu Pancakes
intro: I love a good Sunday pancake, but my no-egg and no-milk routine limited me until I concocted this no-fail recipe. These pancakes are dense, can be loaded with blueberries, strawberries, bananas or any fruit and are apt for a quick weekday breakfast. No need to wait for weekends to enjoy food!
method: In a bowl, mix the flours, baking powder, caster sugar, almond milk, cinnamon powder and orange zest, and whisk it into a thick pancake batter.
Brush a pan with 1 tsp coconut oil and pour a ladleful of the batter.
Cook the pancake on both sides, until golden brown and serve with fruits and maple syrup.
